gpu: Intel Mesa Intel HD 630 (KBL GT2)
notes:
I have 32 gigs of ram, and after several minutes of the game showing the splash screen without booting, I checked btop to find that ram utilization of space engineers 2 alone had climbed to 29.9GB. before I could stop the process, everything froze completely. Guess I'll have to wait a bit to try this again. :(

It also may have been trying to use the intel graphics instead of my amd card, but that shouldn't have stopped it from booting I wouldn't think.
